1858b001-c823-4334-a6cf-3ceb483322b0.Text:
The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerFighterGlossary}Warrior{/g} gains +1 damage {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}. Their {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g} chance is increased by +25% of the Warrior's total {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}.
If the Warrior is wearing heavy armor or power armor, they will gain an addtional +2 deflection and +{uip|ArmorBonus|b3a78f30d7094e809610bbb750fc9aee}% armor.

af26970c-f579-46fa-8afb-38ff77f0ae83.Text: If the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerFighterGlossary}Warrior{/g} has less than 50% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, they gain +{uip|BonusDamage|1c61468f25fc410586a383c32050e971}% {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit chance{/g} and reduce damage taken by -{uip|DamageReduction|1c61468f25fc410586a383c32050e971}%.

4015878d-03b8-4c4d-82ed-c420aaf85b38.Text: Until the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerFighterGlossary}Warrior{/g}'s next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they gain +{uip|TOU|4d2f2a839d2340388d45cf4cf66c947b} {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}, +{uip|ArmorBonus|4d2f2a839d2340388d45cf4cf66c947b}% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}, +{uip|THP|4d2f2a839d2340388d45cf4cf66c947b} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g}, and +{uip|StrengthBonus|4d2f2a839d2340388d45cf4cf66c947b}% damage. They will also gain +1 stack of {g|f:a1a82655a37c4981b2ae8fca5f952338}juggernaut{/g}.

cef41f94-8d87-491a-a939-130bf155dacb.Text:
The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerFighterGlossary}Warrior{/g} gathers all their might for a crushing strike. Their next {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} pushes the enemy away. The distance of the {g|Encyclopedia:PushGlossary}push{/g} is equal to {uip|Push|93d58dfeb6c648858c130e0a902f6ed6} cells. If the target fails a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} check, they will gain a stack of {g|Encyclopedia:FatiguedEffect}fatigue{/g}.
This {g|Encyclopedia:Ability}ability{/g} cannot be used with a heavy rock saw.

0ac05259-00b5-4a78-83e8-096d86673894.Text: {g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}Area attacks{/g} deal an additional +{uip|BonusDamage|038401f387f3417dac61f8e16831c53f} {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} for each enemy in the area of effect. Each melee area attack grants +1 stack of {g|f:a1a82655a37c4981b2ae8fca5f952338}juggernaut{/g} for the rest of combat.

e3a95e22-8aee-48d7-8a61-bbe49708617c.Text: +5 Strength, +5 Toughness, and +5% critical damage per stack.

87cdc39f-a6d0-4c6d-8538-7a88af98703e.Text:
If there are no enemies adjacent to the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerFighterGlossary}Warrior{/g} at the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the Warrior's {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} is increased by +{uip|DamageBonus|ea7d851dd97441e2867fe29f23364f3c} for one {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g}.
Two-handed attacks with melee weapons deal +{uip|TwoHandBonus|ea7d851dd97441e2867fe29f23364f3c} damage.

88dd56a4-5b39-4ce2-9691-8b982110da5f.Text:
The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerFighterGlossary}Warrior{/g} moves in a straight line and launches a {g|Encyclopedia:MeleeAttacksGlossary}melee attack{/g} against any target in the Warrior's path. This attack does not count toward the limit of the Warrior's {g|Encyclopedia:AttacksPerTurn}attacks per turn{/g}.
There must be at least 2 free cells between the Warrior and the target to use {g|f:4955b43454f6488f82892e166c76c995}Charge{/g}.
The Warrior will gain +1 stack of {g|f:a1a82655a37c4981b2ae8fca5f952338}juggernaut{/g} after using this ability.
